message:
feat: Add --host-frozen flag for edgeboxc build

Implements host function support for frozen code in AOT mode:
- Add `--host-frozen` flag to `edgeboxc build` command
- Generate hybrid C code with #ifdef EDGEBOX_USE_HOST_FROZEN
- Register edgebox_frozen.fib as WAMR host function
- Native fib runs on host for ~4x speedup in AOT mode

Usage:
  edgeboxc build app_dir              # embedded frozen (portable)
  edgeboxc build app_dir --host-frozen # host imports (fast AOT)

Also fixes Zig 0.15 compatibility issues:
- Remove duplicate builtin import
- Add getPid() helper for cross-platform support
